query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS paymentConfigs (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  method VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL UNIQUE COMMENT 'alipay|wechat|unionpay',
  accountName VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  accountNumber VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  qrCodeUrl TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
  isEnabled TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  updatedAt BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT (UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000)
);

INSERT IGNORE INTO paymentConfigs (method, accountName, accountNumber, isEnabled) VALUES
  ('alipay', '平台收款账户', '', 1),
  ('wechat', '平台收款账户', '', 1),
  ('unionpay', '平台银行账户', '', 1);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS productEvents (
  id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  storeProductId INT NOT NULL,
  eventType VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL COMMENT 'view|cart_add|order',
  userId INT DEFAULT NULL,
  orderId INT DEFAULT NULL,
  amountUsdd DECIMAL(10,4) DEFAULT NULL,
  createdAt BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT (UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000),
  INDEX idx_store_product (storeProductId),
  INDEX idx_event_type (eventType),
  INDEX idx_created_at (createdAt)
);
